violations.text: Allergy statement was lacking on the menu. Allergy statement to be added. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (chicken slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC brought slicer over to 3-bay sink. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2025
The ceiling in the kitchen area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Equipment placed in 3-bay. Sanitizer made. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2024
Employees' medicines were not stored to prevent the contamination of food, equipment, or utensils. Medicine relocated. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2024
Walk-in door gaskets were observed in poor repair. Flour lid was observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the equipment have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2024
The ceiling in the kitchen area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2024

The floor in the kitchen area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2024

Menus are lacking an allergy statement notifying customers of their obligation to let staff know if they have a food allergy. The person in charge made an allergy sign during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2023

The chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 10 parts per million (ppm). The concentration of chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2023

Employees' medicines were not stored to prevent the contamination of food, equipment, or utensils. Medicine was observed stored on the top of the refrigerator. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2023

Hot water was not turned on in the bathroom handwashing sink during time of inspection. The person in charge turned it on during time of inspection. Hot water must be available for handwashing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2023
The ceiling in the kitchen area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/15/2023
